relics.name: Pumpkin Candle
relics.description: Gain [E] at the start of each turn. Extinguishes after 5 combats. Can be Kindled at Rest Sites.
relics.flavorText: Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...

relics.name: Kaleidoscope
relics.description: Upon pickup, obtain 2 card rewards from other characters.
relics.flavorText: Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...

relics.name: Fishing Rod
relics.description: Every 3 normal combats, Upgrade a random card in your Deck.
relics.flavorText: Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...

relics.name: Silken Tress
relics.description: Enchant all cards in the first card reward with Glam.
relics.flavorText: Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...
